headline: Why The Narrative Around Prudential (LSE:PRU) Is Shifting As Analysts Lift Fair Value Targets
summary: Prudential’s fair value price target has been nudged from £13.34 to £13.65, a small reset that still matters if you are watching where analysts think the shares can reasonably trade. That move sits alongside Street targets clustered around £12.70 and £15.00, as more bullish analysts refine their views and keep positive ratings in place. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader Prudential story and how to keep track as the narrative evolves. Stay updated as...

headline: How Prudential Financial (PRU) Is Rewriting Its Story On Valuation, Growth Drivers And Risks
summary: Prudential Financial’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly from US$114.00 to about US$111.79, keeping projected upside closely aligned with where several recent price targets have been set. This adjustment lines up with mixed analyst commentary, where some firms have nudged targets into the low US$110s while others have shifted into the low US$100s as they reassess catalysts and risks. As you read on, you will see how these cross currents are shaping the evolving story around...
